alert: API latency is rising and web workers are being killed for memory usage.
root_cause: web server memory leak caused worker crashes

evidence_descriptions.check_status:web_server: Web server status is degraded after repeated worker exits.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:web_server: Web logs show workers killed by out-of-memory conditions.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:web_server: Web metrics show memory utilization near exhaustion.

logs: WARN worker restart loop detected count=4

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(web server memory leak caused worker crashes, restart web server to clear memory leak)
distractors: Database queries remain healthy; the repeated failures are in web workers.
